metadata.description: The Azure region for all resources
Project name prefix for resource naming
Container image for the FastAPI application
Azure OpenAI GPT-4o model deployment name
Azure OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model deployment name
Azure OpenAI GPT-4o deployment capacity (in thousands TPM units)
Azure OpenAI GPT-4o-mini deployment capacity (in thousands TPM units)
Azure OpenAI embedding deployment capacity (in thousands TPM units)
Set to true to restore a soft-deleted Azure OpenAI account with the same name
Set to true to restore a soft-deleted Document Intelligence account with the same name
Tags to apply to all resources
